description: Blind XSS: payload executes in a different browsing context (admin panel, logging system, email client). No immediate feedback — requires OOB callback to confirm.
approach: 1. Inject payload with OOB callback (payload phones home when executed)
2. Submit in ALL input fields — especially those likely viewed by internal users
3. Wait for callback — may take hours or days if admin reviews infrequently
4. Callback includes: cookies, URL, user-agent, DOM snapshot, screenshot

self_hosted_collector.description: Minimal JS to collect context when blind XSS fires

high_value_injection_points: User-Agent header (often logged in admin panels)
Chat message (if admins view chat logs)
confirmation: Blind XSS confirmed when OOB callback received with cookie/URL data from admin context
